label: Energy (EBITDA + cash-flow focus, depleting-asset accounting)

deferred_concepts.reason: PV-10 / SEC-defined proven reserves — disclosed in 10-K narrative + supplemental schedules, not standard XBRL concept
Daily / annual production volumes — supplemental disclosure
Finding & development costs per BOE — E&P supplemental
Reserves / production — derived from deferred reserves

notes: Energy issuer book values reflect depleting reserves at historical cost (often understating economic value when oil > $60/bbl, overstating below); P/B is interpreted with that distortion in mind. priceToCFO is added because cash flow is less distorted by impairment / DD&A swings than GAAP earnings — energy E&P writes down assets aggressively at cycle troughs, making P/E unstable. trailingPE absent for the same reason. priceToSales absent because energy 'sales' = commodity price × volume → dominated by external pricing, not value-add. forwardPE absent because consensus EPS forecasts are commodity-price-elastic (and therefore unreliable at cycle inflections).
